_notes: Active-learning ensemble-member config: a parametric ConcatLSTM, NOT the shipped HyperWaveNet.
The active-learning workflow is adapted from PANAMA (arXiv 2509.26564v1); the ConcatLSTM
conditioning scheme (encode the control vector, tile across time, concatenate to audio) is theirs.
hidden_size 18, train_burn_in 8192, pre-emph MRSTFT loss, lr 0.008, ExponentialLR gamma 0.995)
rather than this repo's HyperWaveNet-tuned parametric config, since ConcatLSTM is a different
architecture. Tune during testing as needed.
This LSTM is a disposable query-by-committee acquisition proxy: scripts/active_learn.py trains a
4-member ensemble from this config to find the control settings where members disagree most.
ConcatLSTM derives its conditioning width (1 + encoded_param_dim) from the params below, so there
is no PANAMA-style 'conditioning_dim' key; the params block MUST match the production parametric
model you intend to capture for (here: the Gain/Tone/Boost example).
train_truncate is null so the full window trains in one gradient-carrying pass; with no truncation
the burn-in length is informational only and the loss mask_first (8192) is what excludes the
warm-up region from the loss, so training windows (ny) must exceed 8192.
